metadata.academic_disclaimer: All thresholds require expert validation for academic rigor

bpi_challenge_2020.title: Business Process Intelligence Challenge 2020: Analysis and evaluation of a travel process
bpi_challenge_2020.citation: BPI Challenge 2020 official dataset and analysis results

findings.bottleneck_criteria: Activities with median duration exceeding one day (24 hours)
findings.statistical_method: Median-based threshold rather than mean to avoid outlier bias
findings.success_determination: Process completion without rejection or timeout

process_mining_statistical_control.title: Statistical Process Control Concepts (General Reference)
process_mining_statistical_control.citation: General statistical process control methodology - requires specific validation
process_mining_statistical_control.disclaimer: Application to process mining requires validation

findings.upper_control_limit: Concept: Three standard deviations above process mean (requires validation)
findings.lower_control_limit: Concept: Three standard deviations below process mean (requires validation)
findings.bottleneck_threshold: Hypothesis: Activities exceeding UCL (requires empirical validation)

lean_methodology.title: Toyota Production System (Ohno, 1988) and Lean Waste Identification
lean_methodology.citation: Ohno, T. (1988). Toyota Production System: Beyond Large-Scale Production

waste_thresholds.waiting_waste: Any delay >1 business day between sequential activities
waste_thresholds.over_processing: Activity count >90th percentile of similar successful processes

agile_manifesto.title: Agile Manifesto Principles (Beck et al., 2001)
agile_manifesto.citation: Beck, K., et al. (2001). Manifesto for Agile Software Development
agile_manifesto.twelve_principles_interpretation_disclai: These are data-driven interpretations requiring validation

twelve_principles.early_delivery: APPROXIMATION: Time to first value-add activity <25% of total cycle time (requires validation)
twelve_principles.embrace_change: APPROXIMATION: Process variants <3 for same outcome type (requires validation)
twelve_principles.frequent_delivery: APPROXIMATION: Cycle time in bottom quartile of similar processes (requires validation)
twelve_principles.collaboration: APPROXIMATION: Handoffs between roles minimized (requires validation)
twelve_principles.simplicity: APPROXIMATION: Activity count ≤median of successful similar processes (requires validation)
twelve_principles.working_software: APPROXIMATION: Success rate >75% based on empirical data (requires validation)
twelve_principles.individuals_interactions: APPROXIMATION: Human activities >automated activities ratio (requires validation)
twelve_principles.responding_to_change: APPROXIMATION: Process adaptation evidence in event logs (requires validation)

DomesticDeclarations.statistical_basis: Median duration threshold from BPI Challenge analysis

PermitLog.statistical_basis: Permit processes involve multiple approval stages

PrepaidTravelCost.statistical_basis: Simple prepaid processes should be faster

bottleneck_detection.rationale: Median more robust to outliers than mean
bottleneck_detection.validation: Activities exceeding threshold in >50% of cases flagged as bottlenecks

success_determination.method: End-state analysis with process-specific success criteria
success_determination.validation: Based on BPI Challenge 2020 official process outcomes

lean_waste_calculation.validation: Thresholds based on process type benchmarks and statistical analysis

agile_compliance_scoring.scoring_range: 0.0 to 1.0 per principle, averaged for overall score
